tweetText: Sam Altman addressed an attack on his home and criticisms from a New Yorker article questioning his trustworthiness. This highlights the growing scrutiny leaders in AI face amid rising tensions in the tech landscape. via TechCrunch AI

The rise of AI-generated content and limited access to satellite data is overwhelming our ability to discern truth online. This erodes trust and complicates how we understand reality in the digital age. via WIRED AI

The New Yorker’s profile of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman features an unsettling AI-generated illustration. This raises concerns about the role of AI in creative fields and its impact on traditional artists. via The Verge AI

An AI plushie named Coral shared a surprising theory about Mitski's dad being a CIA operative. This highlights the quirky and unexpected ways AI can engage with pop culture and spark curiosity. via The Verge AI.

Iran's state media has been releasing powerful and graphic videos of the war, overshadowing the White House's lighter social media posts. This shows how effective narrative control can shape public perception during a crisis. via The Verge AI.
